problems.cause: Type mismatch between THROT.Actual and Actual_Speed port
problems.minimal_edit: Change 'THROT.Actual' to 'THROT.Actual_Speed' in the connection AcSpeedToTop

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 34: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.
problems.cause: Type mismatch between Target_Speed port and CNTRL.Target port
problems.minimal_edit: Change 'CNTRL.Target' to 'CNTRL.Target_Speed' in the connection TgSpeedToCntrl

problems.cause: Type mismatch between SM.State_Out and State_Signal port
problems.minimal_edit: Change 'SM.State_Out' to 'SM.State_Signal' in the connection SSToSM

executor_steps: Edit the connection AcSpeedToTop to reference THROT.Actual_Speed instead of THROT.Actual
Edit the connection TgSpeedToCntrl to reference CNTRL.Target_Speed instead of CNTRL.Target
Edit the connection SSToSM to reference SM.State_Signal instead of SM.State_Out
